episodes.title: America’s First Doomsday Cult- Kelpius Cave
episodes.description:
Join us as we explore a Philadelphia cave that looks like an innocent spring house but may just be the start of the first doomsday cult in America (related to Dracula according to Woo!)

Sources: 
Historical Society of Pennsylvania / PhilaPlace – “Cave of Kelpius: Johannes Kelpius and the Society of the Woman in the Wilderness” 
 
⁠PhilaPlace Article⁠  

Christian History Institute – “The Wissahickon Hermits” 
 
⁠Christian History Institute⁠  

U.S. History.org – “Cave of Kelpius” 
 
⁠USHistory.org Article⁠  

Friends of Wissahickon – “Kelpius & Hermit’s Cave” 
 
⁠Friends of Wissahickon⁠  

WHYY Philadelphia – “Cave a vestige of the Hermits of the Wissahickon” 
 
⁠WHYY Article⁠  

Wikipedia – Johannes Kelpius / Wissahickon Creek 
 

Hidden City Philadelphia – “Doomsday Cult on the Wissahickon” 
 
⁠Hidden City Philadelphia⁠  

Reddit discussions and folklore references regarding modern legends and paranormal experiences associated with Kelpius Cave  

⁠A Brief Biography of Kelpius⁠ 

⁠Johannes Kelpius - Wikipedia⁠
